human_review_items.summary: Inventory geometry_type axis lists 'Polygon, Point' but the fixture and grader also exercise LineString (cycleway_segments) and MultiPolygon (parks). Author + four prior evaluators flagged as deliberate persona-driven extension; either update inventory or accept as-is.

Inventory OSM-tag axis for districts lists boundary=administrative but the fixture is sliced from Overture's divisions.division_area. Author + four prior evaluators flagged the two as structurally equivalent for inventory coverage.
